RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_EVENT: A special card originating from the Astral Party event system.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_STEPS: Steps gained from room entry for [Persona: Bionic Jasmine]. Unassigned, Rest Site, Shop, Treasure, Monster, and Map rooms grant [blue]2[/blue]. Event rooms grant [blue]3[/blue]. Elite rooms grant [blue]6[/blue]. Boss rooms grant [blue]10[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_TEMPO: Discard this card at the end of turn. This keyword is removed after the card enters the discard pile.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_MOON_: Knowing what you want is half about knowing what must be given up before you can get it. Moon relics can be purchased multiple times, their effects scale with stacks, and any values that change with stacks are marked in purple.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_ETERN:
When you enter a shop, gain extra effects based on your Eternal Starlight stacks:
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]5[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]25[/blue], gain [blue]15[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]40[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]56[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold and immediately obtain Membership Card
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_DICE_:
When you own any [blue]2[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]1[/blue].
When you own any [blue]5[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]2[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_FLASH:
As long as you own at least [blue]1[/blue] Flashlight relic, at the start of combat apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Exposure[/gold] to all enemies.
When you kill an enemy with [gold]Exposure[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_BOXIN:
If you own any [blue]2[/blue] Boxing Glove relics, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] at combat start.
If you own all [blue]3[/blue], gain [blue]3[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] instead.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_LISTE: Set: Listening to the Solar Roar

Active while you own [relic]Variant: Sinkou[/relic], [relic]Miniature Milen[/relic], [relic]Solar Crown[/relic], and [relic]Echo of Divine Light[/relic]:
· At turn start, all enemies trigger [power]Blazing Solar Burn[/power] one additional time.
· Whenever [card]Punitive Judgment[/card] enters your hand, upgrade it if needed and give it [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_DREAM: A special chip from the [gold]Dreamship[/gold] series.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_SPIRI: A special chip from the [gold]Spirit Festival[/gold] series.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_WATER: A special chip from the [gold]Water Town[/gold] series.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_MAGIC: A special chip from the [gold]Magic Academy[/gold] series.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_DRAGO: A special chip from the [gold]Dragon Palace[/gold] series.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_GHOST: If the current combat is an Elite or Boss room, at the start of each of your turns gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Modification[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_COLLE: A special card pool mainly intended for commemorative value.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_UNIQU: Only [blue]1[/blue] Unique card with the same name can remain in your hand. If a same-name [gold]Unique[/gold] card is already there, the later card added to hand is automatically [gold]Exhausted[/gold].

A special material relic used for [gold]Enigmatic Synthesis[/gold]. When you gain another copy of the same Unique Material, it merges into the existing relic and adds stacks instead of creating a duplicate relic.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_COOLD: This card also has the effects of [gold]Unique[/gold], [gold]Retain[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_ULTIM:
Each Ultimate Skill card charges independently and cannot be played at first.
Whenever you play an Attack card whose actual cost is at least [blue]1[/blue], this card gains [blue]1[/blue] charge, up to [blue]100[/blue].
Charge does not reset when combat ends.
When this card reaches [blue]100[/blue] charge, it can be played; after play, this card's charge returns to [blue]0[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_FUSIO: Hyper Temporal Nut, Distinguished Cape, Beating Remnant, Buffer Shield.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_INVES:
Whenever a target with [power]Investigation Target[/power] is killed, the killer triggers the current-stage [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event card, and the holder of [relic]Persona: Bonnie[/relic] gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Every [blue]6[/blue] successful triggers, the stage advances: [gold]Phase 1[/gold] -> [gold]Phase 2[/gold] -> [gold]Phase 3[/gold] -> [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold].
After [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold] has successfully triggered [blue]6[/blue] more times, using [card]Concealing Operation[/card] on an Elite or Boss also triggers [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold] immediately.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_SOLAR_BOMBAR: Discard all cards in your hand, then bombard random enemies. Base [blue]3[/blue] hits. For every [blue]2[/blue] discarded cards, bombard [blue]1[/blue] extra time. Base damage is [blue]3[/blue] and increases by [blue]1[/blue] for every [blue]3[/blue] total Energy among discarded cards. Discarded [blue]0[/blue]-cost cards count as [blue]1[/blue] Energy, and discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_ORBIT: When used as [gold]Orbital Bombardment Material[/gold], this card counts as [blue]2[/blue] cards and its cost counts as [blue]3[/blue] Energy.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_KEYWORD_ASTRAL_MIXED:
Attack: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength
Defensive Skill: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Dexterity
Skill (no Block): Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP
Power: Gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy
Status: Draw [blue]1[/blue] card
Curse: Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] Block
